content.query:
CREATE VIEW     v_M3_OpenPurchaseOrders_Jan012023
as
SELECT          DISTINCT POH.PUNO AS [PO Number]
,               SUP.SUNO as [Supplier ID]
,               SUP.SUNM as [Supplier Name]
,               ITM.ITNO AS [Item Number]
,               ITM.ITDS as [Item Description]
,               POH.DWDT AS [Requested Delivery Date]
,               ORQA as [Order Qty]
,               RVQA as [Received Qty]
,               ORQA - RVQA as [Open Qty]
FROM            dbo.M3_MPHEAD POH
JOIN            dbo.M3_MPLINE POL ON POH.PUNO = POL.PUNO
JOIN            dbo.M3_MITMAS ITM ON POL.ITNO = ITM.ITNO
JOIN            dbo.M3_CIDMAS SUP on POL.SUNO = SUP.SUNO
WHERE           POH.DWDT >= '20230101'
and           POL.PUSL < '99'
--drop view     v_M3_OpenPurchaseOrders_Jan012023
